item.description:
# PMT 0.0.91
- Improve configuration upgrade resilience so missing older config fields no longer reset the whole config. - Remove unused Keychain code now that API credentials are stored through PMT configuration. - Add an explicit Quit button next to Save. - Use the app bundle version for GitHub request User-Agent values instead of a hard-coded version. - Add release preflight checks for README version drift and hard-coded PMT user agents.
